Hero.subtitle: A family-run workshop in Ilioupoli since 1970. Service, diagnostics and repairs with real expertise, genuine parts and transparent pricing.
Hero.imageAlt: NISSAN specialist workshop Andreas Antoniadis in Ilioupoli

Services.title: Complete care for your car
Services.subtitle: From scheduled service to the most complex repairs: all under one roof, for every make.

maintenance.name: Service & Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Scheduled service to manufacturer specifications, using quality parts.

diagnostics.name: Diagnostics
diagnostics.desc: Electronic fault diagnosis with modern equipment, for every vehicle system.

brakes.name: Brakes
brakes.desc: Inspection, pad & disc replacement and full braking-system service.

ac.name: A/C Service
ac.desc: Air-conditioning maintenance & recharge (R134a & R1234yf refrigerant) and sanitisation.

batteries.name: Batteries
batteries.desc: Battery testing, charging and replacement for a reliable start in any season.

lpg.name: LPG / Autogas
lpg.desc: Maintenance and servicing of LPG autogas systems for cleaner, cheaper driving.

suspension.name: Suspension
suspension.desc: Shock absorbers, control arms and full suspension checks for comfort and grip.

lubricants.name: Oils & Lubricants
lubricants.desc: Oil & filter changes with premium lubricants for every engine.

emissions.name: Emissions & MOT Prep
emissions.desc: Emissions card (K.E.K.) issuance and preparation for the KTEO/MOT.

parts.name: Parts & Accessories
parts.desc: Genuine parts and branded, certified after-market parts for all makes.

Nissan.title: NISSAN is home for us
Nissan.body: We know every Nissan model inside out, from Micra, Note and Qashqai to Juke, X-Trail and Navara. Diagnostics, parts and repairs with manufacturer precision.

About.title: Half a century of caring for your car
About.lead: Since 1970, the Antoniadis family has serviced and repaired cars in Ilioupoli.
About.p1: Evangelos Antoniadis founded the workshop in 1970. From a small family workshop we grew into a specialist NISSAN service centre and AUTOFIT network member, always keeping the personal relationship of trust with every customer.
About.p2: Today, with modern facilities and latest-generation diagnostic equipment, we take on every job, from a simple service to complex repairs, for all car makes.

specialist.title: NISSAN specialists
specialist.desc: Deep expertise across every Nissan model, with full coverage for all makes.

family.title: Family-run since 1970
family.desc: Over 50 years of trust, carried from one generation to the next.

genuine.title: Quality parts
genuine.desc: Genuine parts and branded, certified after-market parts for every repair.

transparent.title: Transparent pricing
transparent.desc: Clear quotes before any work, with no surprises on the bill.

technicians.title: Certified technicians
technicians.desc: An experienced team with modern diagnostic equipment.

network.title: AUTOFIT network member
network.desc: Nationwide support and warranty through the AUTOFIT network.

Reviews.title: Trusted by hundreds of drivers
Reviews.subtitle: Our Google rating speaks for our work.

Autofit.title: Backed by the AUTOFIT network
Autofit.subtitle: As a certified AUTOFIT member, we give you the benefits of a nationwide network with the personal care of a family workshop.
Autofit.point1Desc: We use quality, certified spare parts that are covered by a warranty.
Autofit.point2Desc: Servicing at our workshop does not affect your car's factory warranty.

SisterCompany.title: Looking for your next vehicle?
SisterCompany.body: Our sister company, Wheel Way, trades quality used cars and motorhomes in Rafina. We look after your car, and Wheel Way helps you find the next one.
SisterCompany.logoAlt: Wheel Way, used cars & motorhomes dealership

Contact.title: Visit our workshop
Contact.subtitle: In the heart of Ilioupoli, easy to reach. Call us or drop by.
Contact.storefrontAlt: The storefront of Andreas Antoniadis workshop in Ilioupoli

Footer.tagline: NISSAN specialist workshop in Ilioupoli. Family care for your car since 1970.
